description_long: This object is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply angular, stealth-inspired design. Its body is predominantly black with a faceted, polygonal fuselage and sharply swept wings that extend outward and slightly downward, giving it an aggressive, high-speed appearance. The nose is long and pointed, while the rear features twin vertical stabilizers set in a V-tail configuration. Two cylindrical engine nacelles are mounted beneath the wings, suggesting a jet propulsion system. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with minimal visible panel lines or windows, emphasizing a stealthy, high-performance aesthetic. There are no visible landing gear or cockpit details, reinforcing its streamlined, modern look.
description: A black, angular airplane with swept wings, V-tail, and twin underwing jet engines, featuring a sleek, stealth-inspired design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long, pointed nose, sharply swept wings, and twin cylindrical engines beneath the wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the angular, faceted fuselage, V-tail, and wide wing span with downward sweep.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, emphasizing the pointed nose, swept wings, and engine placement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the V-tail configuration, twin vertical stabilizers, and the symmetry of the wing and engine arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and slight anhedral angle, no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: V-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: No visible cockpit; canopy or windows are not apparent.
